nits.issue: RUNS_QUEUE_URL check happens AFTER the cloud_runs INSERT — orphan pending row if env missing. In prod the env is set; cosmetic.
Concurrent first-trigger race on ad-hoc cloud_agent (no UNIQUE on (workspace_id, agent_id)). Pre-existing pattern in cloud-runs.ts.
MessageGroupId differs from cloud-runs.ts (bare workspace_id vs `${ws}:${laneId}`). Both defensible; spec's parenthetical supports the chosen form.
Extra SQS payload fields (automationId/automationVersion/triggeredBy/inputs) the existing dispatcher Lambda doesn't consume — harmless; the cloud_runs.inputs column carries the truth.
JSONB pattern matches local convention but project memory prefers sql.json() helper for postgres-js.
Spec calls for live SQS receive + worker pickup integration; the vitest unit covers the dispatch path with mocks, the live integration is exercised in this step's e2e log.
